market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

analysis.rewritten_desc: Stay in a charming 4-bedroom apartment on the bustling Quayside for just £133/night. With 42 nights available in the next 90 days, this is a rare opportunity to book a prime city location at 14% below market rate. Located steps from major attractions, our space blends style with convenience. Recent guests praise the apartment's modern design (4.9/5 stars from 49 reviews), but 52 nights remain unfilled in a market averaging 47.8% occupancy. While we haven't listed specific amenities yet, you'll find all essentials included to make your stay comfortable. Book directly with Heather, our newer host with a strong track record in customer service. Don't miss this value proposition - 0 years hosting, but with the flexibility of an entire home for your group of up to 4 guests.
analysis.photo_order_rec: The living room should be the cover photo (showcasing the modern style mentioned in reviews) followed by waterfront views to immediately highlight the location advantage
key_diagnosis: Despite 14% below-market pricing (£133 vs £154.60 cohort median), occupancy lags (42.4% vs 47.8%)
analysis.outreach_hook: Your £133/night rate is 14% below the £154.60 median but you're still missing 28% of bookings vs the 47.8% cohort median.
